title: The Mind Reader
writer: Robert Lord, Wilson Mizner, Vivian Crosby
actors: Warren William, Constance Cummings, Allen Jenkins
plot: Con-man Chandler and his partner Frank decide to start a clairvoyant act. Chandler falls for Sylvia, one of their marks, but their relationship is challenged when his deception impacts others' lives and Sylvia urges him to reform.
